form.formComment: Recorded a nose win (29.75) in a Grade 4/5 last time at this track. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and four places from eight starts. Can feature in the finish.

form.formComment: Good effort at double-figure odds last time when third (30.83) over 525m at The Meadows. Has a low draw. Looks tested in this line-up.

form.formComment: Hit the frame latest (34.52) when third at this track in a Grade 5. Yet to score but has placed each of three runs from this draw. Looks a leading chance.

form.formComment: Backs up after finishing 6th on April 12 over 300m at Healesville in a Grade 5 H. Happy enough to avoid.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Through the turn out of the home straight on the first occasion gave ground.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (30.98) at The Meadows in a Grade 5, finishing seventh and beaten 11 lengths. Has performed well off the draw with a win and two places from four starts. Has ability and can sneak into the finish.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a fast early split but had to contend with second when clocking 34.32 over 595m at this track. Boxed on well to finish runner-up last time. Leading player.
